reviews.comment:
Lugar cómodo para reunirse. inflado gratuito de cubiertas como en todas las YPF.

(Translated by Google)
Comfortable place to meet. Free tire inflation, just like at all YPF stations.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMtMTlPbHp3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buenas instalaciones. Pero varias veces está cerrada a la noche o te dan vueltas con qué vehiculos te pueden hacer el cambio de aceite y filtros

(Translated by Google)
Very good facilities. But they're often closed at night, or they'll give you a hard time about which vehicles they can use to change your oil and filters.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCcExDYlpBEAE

reviews.comment:
Parada obligada de regreso de pedaleadas. Medialunas espectaculares!!!

(Translated by Google)
A must-stop on the way back from cycling. Spectacular croissants!!!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCeE8yQTBRRRAB

reviews.comment:
El ypf full son de terror tardan un monton en atender.

(Translated by Google)
YPF Full is terrible, they take ages to serve you.

reviews.comment:
Se me rompió el auto y nos trataron con la mejor onda, muy atento el mecánico y muy limpios los baños. No me puedo quejar💪💖

(Translated by Google)
My car broke down and they treated us incredibly well. The mechanic was very helpful and the restrooms were spotless. I have absolutely no complaints! 💪💖
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtMV9qUUZ3EAE
